text:
<|system|>
You are a dashboard design assistant. You generate structured, practical, and heuristic-aligned dashboard design recommendations.
<|user|>
Instruction:
Generate a structured dashboard design recommendation based on the given dashboard brief.

Dashboard brief:
Domain: E-Commerce
Available data fields: date, cart_events, revenue, product_category, traffic_source
Key metrics to track: Gross Merchandise Value (GMV), Conversion Rate, Revenue by Category
User goals: analyze traffic sources, reduce cart abandonment, compare category revenue
<|assistant|>
{
  "context_summary": "This E-Commerce dashboard is designed to help users analyze traffic sources and reduce cart abandonment. It focuses on Gross Merchandise Value (GMV), Conversion Rate, Revenue by Category using data from fields such as date, cart_events, revenue.",
  "kpi_task_chart_mapping": [
    {
      "kpi": "Gross Merchandise Value (GMV)",
      "user_task": "detailed records",
      "recommended_chart": "table",
      "rationale": "Bar charts allow quick comparison across discrete categories."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Conversion Rate",
      "user_task": "category comparison",
      "recommended_chart": "bar chart",
      "rationale": "Tables support detailed record inspection and sorting."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Revenue by Category",
      "user_task": "trend over time",
      "recommended_chart": "line chart",
      "rationale": "Consistent color coding reduces cognitive load and speeds interpretation."
    }
  ],
  "layout_hierarchy": "Single-page layout: KPI cards at top, heatmap in center, bar chart and line chart at bottom.",
  "labels_scales_colors": "Sequential color scale for heatmap. Diverging palette for variance charts.",
  "interactions": [
    "Date range filter",
    "Tooltip on hover",
    "Zoom on time axis"
  ],
  "design_rationales": [
    "Heatmaps reveal patterns across two dimensions simultaneously.",
    "Bar charts allow quick comparison across discrete categories."
  ]
}

<|system|>
You are a dashboard design assistant. You generate structured, practical, and heuristic-aligned dashboard design recommendations.
<|user|>
Instruction:
Generate a structured dashboard design recommendation based on the given dashboard brief.

Dashboard brief:
Domain: Finance
Available data fields: date, profit, actual_spend, budget, department
Key metrics to track: Revenue vs. Cost, Accounts Receivable, Debt-to-Equity Ratio
User goals: track profit margins, review debt levels, forecast revenue
<|assistant|>
{
  "context_summary": "This Finance dashboard is designed to help users track profit margins and review debt levels. It focuses on Revenue vs. Cost, Accounts Receivable, Debt-to-Equity Ratio using data from fields such as date, profit, actual_spend.",
  "kpi_task_chart_mapping": [
    {
      "kpi": "Revenue vs. Cost",
      "user_task": "category comparison",
      "recommended_chart": "bar chart",
      "rationale": "Donut/stacked bar charts show part-to-whole relationships clearly."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Accounts Receivable",
      "user_task": "trend over time",
      "recommended_chart": "line chart",
      "rationale": "Heatmaps reveal patterns across two dimensions simultaneously."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Debt-to-Equity Ratio",
      "user_task": "detailed records",
      "recommended_chart": "table",
      "rationale": "Filtering controls empower users to focus on relevant subsets of data."
    }
  ],
  "layout_hierarchy": "Left panel: KPI cards (vertical). Right panel: main chart on top, detail table below.",
  "labels_scales_colors": "Sequential color scale for heatmap. Diverging palette for variance charts.",
  "interactions": [
    "Toggle between chart types",
    "Export to CSV button",
    "Highlight on selection"
  ],
  "design_rationales": [
    "Drill-down interactions let users move from summary to detail without leaving the dashboard.",
    "Heatmaps reveal patterns across two dimensions simultaneously."
  ]
}

<|system|>

<|user|>
Instruction:
Generate a structured dashboard design recommendation based on the given dashboard brief.

Dashboard brief:
Domain: HR
Available data fields: training_status, date, satisfaction_score, exit_date, department
Key metrics to track: Absenteeism Rate, Overtime Hours, Headcount
User goals: measure employee satisfaction, identify overtime hotspots, assess workforce diversity
<|assistant|>
{
  "context_summary": "This HR dashboard is designed to help users measure employee satisfaction and identify overtime hotspots. It focuses on Absenteeism Rate, Overtime Hours, Headcount using data from fields such as training_status, date, satisfaction_score.",
  "kpi_task_chart_mapping": [
    {
      "kpi": "Absenteeism Rate",
      "user_task": "relationship/correlation",
      "recommended_chart": "scatter plot",
      "rationale": "Consistent color coding reduces cognitive load and speeds interpretation."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Overtime Hours",
      "user_task": "category comparison",
      "recommended_chart": "bar chart",
      "rationale": "KPI cards provide immediate visibility into the most critical metrics."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Headcount",
      "user_task": "detailed records",
      "recommended_chart": "table",
      "rationale": "Donut/stacked bar charts show part-to-whole relationships clearly."
    }
  ],
  "layout_hierarchy": "Left panel: KPI cards (vertical). Right panel: main chart on top, detail table below.",
  "labels_scales_colors": "Brand-aligned primary color for main metrics; muted tones for secondary data.",
  "interactions": [
    "Search/filter on table",
    "Cross-filter between charts",
    "Tooltip on hover"
  ],
  "design_rationales": [
    "Consistent color coding reduces cognitive load and speeds interpretation.",
    "KPI cards provide immediate visibility into the most critical metrics."
  ]
}

<|system|>
You are a dashboard design assistant. You generate structured, practical, and heuristic-aligned dashboard design recommendations.
<|user|>
Instruction:
Generate a structured dashboard design recommendation based on the given dashboard brief.

Dashboard brief:
Domain: Marketing
Available data fields: conversions, spend, channel, date, clicks
Key metrics to track: Customer Acquisition Cost, Email Open Rate, Lead Conversion Rate
User goals: identify top-converting campaigns, evaluate campaign performance, measure brand reach
<|assistant|>
{
  "context_summary": "This Marketing dashboard is designed to help users identify top-converting campaigns and evaluate campaign performance. It focuses on Customer Acquisition Cost, Email Open Rate, Lead Conversion Rate using data from fields such as conversions, spend, channel.",
  "kpi_task_chart_mapping": [
    {
      "kpi": "Customer Acquisition Cost",
      "user_task": "detailed records",
      "recommended_chart": "table",
      "rationale": "Scatter plots expose correlations and outliers between two variables."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Email Open Rate",
      "user_task": "relationship/correlation",
      "recommended_chart": "scatter plot",
      "rationale": "KPI cards provide immediate visibility into the most critical metrics."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Lead Conversion Rate",
      "user_task": "trend over time",
      "recommended_chart": "line chart",
      "rationale": "Tables support detailed record inspection and sorting."
    }
  ],
  "layout_hierarchy": "Top row: KPI cards. Middle: main chart (full width). Bottom: supporting charts side by side.",
  "labels_scales_colors": "Brand-aligned primary color for main metrics; muted tones for secondary data.",
  "interactions": [
    "Search/filter on table",
    "Export to CSV button",
    "Toggle between chart types"
  ],
  "design_rationales": [
    "Donut/stacked bar charts show part-to-whole relationships clearly.",
    "Line charts effectively communicate trends over continuous time periods."
  ]
}
